goal: Name the repo's four product surfaces explicitly, separate shipped from experimental claims, and leave a stable baseline for future packaging decisions.
constraints: Do not change runtime behavior in this tranche
Keep the status language honest to the current repo state
behavioral_changes: The repo now has one canonical document that names its four major surfaces and their maturity levels.
The README now distinguishes product-layer drift from manifest-contract drift.
Phase 5 of the execution plan is now partially completed and grounded in concrete docs.
follow_up: Use the four-layer map as the baseline if the repo is later split into separate packages.
Harden evaluate.py so methodology and discovery scores are grounded in the repo's real artifact state rather than static constants.
